loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: Showing current THD (R-phase) and aggregated current THD compliance; voltage THD, H5, H7, flicker, and crest factor are not measured by this meter.

loop1.title: Distortion & Harmonic Profile
loop1.note: Showing current THD evolution (R/Y/B phases) from the shared buffer; voltage THD columns (thd_voltage_*) are mostly null on this meter and will render as honest blanks.

loop1.title: Load Impact & Transformer Stress
loop1.note: Showing Power Factor and Phase Angle time-series from the shared buffer. K-factor data is not directly measured by this meter's schema (no k_factor column), so the K-Stress view stats and series will render as honest blanks.
